_comment: Phase 192 D2 — US-standards preset OVERLAY EXAMPLE. This is documentation, NOT auto-loaded. Copy the slots you need into <project>/_BIM_COORD/mep_sizing_rules.json (the MepSizingRegistry layers that file over the corporate STING_MEP_SIZING_RULES.json). It only changes values where the registry already has a slot — STING adds NO new US calculation engines. Sources: NEC Ch 9 Table 1 (conduit fill 40% for >2 conductors), NEC 392.22 (cable-tray fill 50%), SMACNA (US duct region uses the US_IP standardSizes already in the corporate file), ASHRAE 90.1 (air density 1.2), ASHRAE A48 / 90.1 (NC targets). Verify against the project spec before use.
_notes: Set _defaultRegion to US_IP so duct/pipe sizing reads the US_IP standard-size + bore tables already in the corporate file.
conduit.maxFillPct 40 = NEC Chapter 9 Table 1 for more than two conductors (corporate default is BS 7671's 45%).
cableTray.maxFillPct 50 = NEC 392.22 (matches the corporate value; restated here for provenance).
ncTargets are ASHRAE A48 / 90.1 design values; restate per the corporate file's acoustics block keys.
